creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
miwi        2010-01-31 00:43:31 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    www                  Makefile 
  Added files:
    www/yourls           Makefile distinfo pkg-descr pkg-plist 
    www/yourls/files     pkg-message.in 
  Log:
  YOURLS is a small set of PHP scripts that will allow you
  to run your own URL shortening service (a la TinyURL).
  
  You can make it private or public, you can pick custom
  keyword URLs, it comes with its own API.
  
  WWW: http://yourls.org/
  
  PR:             ports/143316
  Submitted by:   Joe Horn <joehorn at gmail.com>
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
  1.2537    +1 -0      ports/www/Makefile
  1.1       +44 -0     ports/www/yourls/Makefile (new)
  1.1       +3 -0      ports/www/yourls/distinfo (new)
  1.1       +14 -0     ports/www/yourls/files/pkg-message.in (new)
  1.1       +7 -0      ports/www/yourls/pkg-descr (new)
  1.1       +328 -0    ports/www/yourls/pkg-plist (new)
